steps.title: Identify the inserted phrase
steps.content: The phrase "the International Criminal Police Organization" is a parenthetical insertion that defines Interpol. It's introduced by an em dash, so it must be closed by a matching em dash — paired punctuation.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
(A) "Organization—" closes the em-dash pair correctly.

(B) colon, (C) no punctuation, and (D) comma all break the paired structure.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
